vulnerability.reference: Coaching staff over-reliance on automated player tracking without manual spot-checks.
vulnerability.generated: Coaches and analysts rely on automated tracking outputs without independent verification, making them unable to detect identity switches.

impact.reference: Suboptimal tactical decisions based on misidentified player performance data, harming team outcomes.
impact.generated: Flawed performance metrics and tactical insights distort player evaluations and game strategies, undermining team effectiveness.

dose_response.reference: Identity switches and trajectory errors from occlusion/disocclusion mis-association enable false trajectories, which in sports performance analysis leads to coaching staff over-reliance on automated player tracking without manual spot-checks, resulting in suboptimal tactical decisions harming team outcomes.
dose_response.generated: Identity switches and trajectory errors from occlusion/disocclusion mis-association, through use in sports performance evaluation, trigger reliance on unverified automated outputs that miss identity switches, leading to distorted player evaluations and undermined team effectiveness.
